{{Quote|Thank you for aiding my daughter. Perhaps she is correct about the threat posed by those Sandpeople. It is good that steps have been taken to neutralize them.|Huff Darklighter, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:DE" />}}
'''Dera Darklighter''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was the daughter of [[Huff Darklighter]] and [[Huff Darklighter's second wife|his second wife]] and the younger half-sister of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Biggs's death shook Huff. He decided he wanted more heirs. His second wife decided she wasn't interested in having any more than the one she'd already borne.|[[Lanal Darklighter]], about Dera and her mother|<ref name="TBW" />}}
[[File:Dera_darklighter.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Dera Darklighter with her half-brother [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs]].]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Dera Darklighter secretly joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] after the death of Biggs Darklighter at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. She was not enough skilled to become a pilot but her charisma and enthusiasm made her a very good speaker.<ref name="Insider65" /> She thus encouraged people from Tatooine to join the Rebellion.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Dera also tried, unsuccessfully, to convince her father to stop working with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], in order to limit criminality and corruption on Tatooine. Therefore, she decided to use her father's connections with Jabba's henchmen to learn how to fight the Hutt, and possibly help the Rebellion. She managed to provide smuggled items and information about Imperial forces for the Alliance.<ref name="Insider65" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> she had an obsession with [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]]. She employed a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to eradicate a tribe of dangerous Sand Peoples dwelling within a [[Tusken Cave|cave]] near their [[Darklighter estate|home]].<ref name="SWG:DE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dera Darklighter appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:DE" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> With the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]],<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> Dera Darklighter was incorporated into the revamped [[W:c:swg:Darklighter's Estate questline|Darklighter's Estate questline]].<ref name="SWG:DE" />
